business.name: Shree Ganesh Furniture Works
business.tagline: Custom furniture, built to last generations
business.address: Shop No. 12, Market Road, Nashik, Maharashtra 422001

hero.headline: Furniture that fits your home, not the other way around
hero.subheadline: 35 years of hand-built cabinets, beds and dining sets, made to your exact measurements.

about.heading: Three generations of woodwork
about.text: Started in 1989 by Ramesh Patil, Shree Ganesh Furniture Works has grown from a one-room workshop to Nashik's trusted name for custom furniture. Every piece is measured, built and finished on-site in our own workshop — no outsourcing, no shortcuts.

services.title: Custom Wardrobes
services.description: Built-in and free-standing wardrobes measured for your exact room dimensions.
services.longDescription: Every wardrobe is measured on-site, then built and finished in our own workshop. Choose sliding or hinged doors, laminate or veneer finish, and internal layouts for hanging, shelving, or drawers.

testimonials.name: Anita Deshmukh
testimonials.text: Ordered a full wardrobe and dining set. The finishing quality is far better than the showroom furniture we compared it to, and it cost less.

testimonials.name: Suresh Kulkarni
testimonials.text: They measured our kitchen twice to be sure before cutting anything. Delivered exactly on the promised date.

testimonials.name: Priya Joshi
testimonials.text: Restored my grandmother's almirah — looks brand new but they kept the original carving intact.

seo.title: Shree Ganesh Furniture Works — Custom Furniture in Nashik
seo.description: Custom wardrobes, dining sets, modular kitchens and furniture restoration in Nashik. 35 years of in-house craftsmanship. Free site visit and quote.
